breakfast.serpme_desc: Selection of cheeses and olives, homemade jams, honey & butter, summer tomatoes, spicy dip, tahini-curd spread, pastries, 'Çingene' salad and seasonal warm sides.
breakfast.plain_omlet_desc: Classic omelette prepared with free-range eggs.
breakfast.herb_omlet_desc: Prepared with free-range eggs, fresh herbs, and local cheese.
breakfast.potato_omlet_desc: Hearty omelette with potatoes, made with free-range eggs.
breakfast.menemen_desc: Traditional Turkish scrambled eggs with field tomatoes and green peppers.

snacks.mini_burger_desc: Three mini burgers served in soft buns with a side of crispy fries.
snacks.taco_desc: Served with specially seasoned minced meat, corn, and fresh tomatoes.
snacks.mozzarella_desc: Panko-crusted mozzarella sticks with signature tomato sauce.
snacks.calamari_desc: Golden fried calamari served with lemon and spicy mayo sauce.
snacks.yogurt_fries_desc: Crispy fries topped with yogurt and a spicy butter sauce.
snacks.jalapeno_bites_desc: Crispy balls filled with melted cheese and a hint of jalapeno.

salads.greek_desc: Tomatoes, cucumbers, feta cheese, olives, and oregano.
salads.coban_desc: Finely chopped tomatoes, cucumbers, and onions with lemon dressing.
salads.special_desc: Seasonal greens, walnuts, pomegranate molasses, and chef's special dressing.

main.anne_kofte_desc: Home-style meatballs served with buttered orzo and spicy yogurt sauce.
main.manti_desc: Traditional Turkish dumplings served with yogurt and hot butter sauce.
main.denizkabugu_burger_desc: Special burger patty, tomatoes, onions, and signature sauce. Served with crispy fries.
main.lemon_pasta_desc: Refreshing pasta prepared with fresh lemon, olive oil, and parmesan.
main.bolonez_desc: Classic pasta with slow-cooked meat sauce.
main.arrabiata_desc: Penne pasta with a spicy tomato sauce.
main.denizkabugu_pizza_desc: Special cheese pizza with tomato sauce, feta, tulum, cecil, and mozzarella.
main.akdeniz_pizza_desc: Mediterranean style pizza with tomato sauce, white cheese, olives and oregano.

beverages.tahiti_desc: Tropical notes with a refreshing blend of lemongrass, hibiscus, and pineapple.
beverages.refresh_desc: Refreshing cold tea prepared with satsuma, pineapple, and hibiscus notes.
